summary: Comprehensive test suite covering all core requirements: max-age, keep-latest-N, max-total-size policies, combined application, and dry-run mode. Edge cases for empty lists, no policies, and negative values are tested with proper error assertions. Output sorting is verified. Well-organized with clear fixtures (REFERENCE_DATE, TEST_ARTIFACTS across 3 workflows). Some gaps: no tests for artifacts with identical creation dates (tie-breaking), artifacts created exactly at policy boundaries, or varied fixture structures (single-artifact workflows, etc.). Tests verify counts and artifact names explicitly, which is strong. Would catch most regressions but might miss subtle boundary-condition bugs. Professional structure, good readability, and independence between tests.
